calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. There being no appearances, the court ordered the petition off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Kelly for Sharon Wilson, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Mr. Kelly confirmed that the decedent's estate in San Francisco was a named beneficiary of a trust, but the decedent did not receive the distribution during her lifetime. The petitioner seeks to follow up with the trustee regarding the distribution. The primary issue has been identifying and locating the correct trustee. Multiple trustees and co-trustees have been involved, making service of notice difficult. A private investigator was hired, and counsel now believes they have identified the trustee at the time of Deanna Wilson's passing. A demand letter for an accounting has been sent to the trustee, who is now believed to be located in Oregon rather than Arizona.

Mr. Kelly requested a 30-day continuance to allow time to prepare necessary filings.

The court continued the matter to April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
